parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ embeds: [{ title: '⏳ Upgrading — ' + $json.container, description: 'Upgrade triggered for **' + $json.stackName + '** on `' + $json.targetHost + '`\n\nSemaphore playbook is running...', color: 16776960, timestamp: new Date().toISOString(), footer: { text: 'Watchtower → n8n Upgrader' } }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ template_id: 4, debug: false, diff: false, dry_run: false, environment: '{\"stack_name\": \"' + $('Resolve Stack Mapping').first().json.stackName + '\", \"stack_path\": \"' + $('Resolve Stack Mapping').first().json.stackPath + '\", \"limit_hosts\": \"' + $('Resolve Stack Mapping').first().json.targetHost + '\"}', limit: $('Resolve Stack Mapping').first().json.targetHost }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ embeds: [{ title: '✅ Upgrade Successful — ' + $json.container, description: '**' + $json.stackName + '** on `' + $json.targetHost + '` has been upgraded successfully!\n\n🧹 Dangling images pruned.', color: 3066993, timestamp: new Date().toISOString(), footer: { text: 'Watchtower → n8n Upgrader' } }] }) }}
